alt: envxray results: a summary row (5 declared, 4 read, 3 high, 2 medium) then findings — DATABASE_URL and STRIPE_SECRET flagged HIGH as committed secrets, JWT_SECRET HIGH as read-but-undeclared, API_TOKEN and SMTP_HOST medium.
threads:
Dua bug env kejadian berulang: secret nyangkut di .env yang ke-commit, dan process.env.X yang dibaca kode tapi lupa ditaruh di .env, jadi prod boot dengan undefined lalu tumbang.

envxray: tempel .env kamu + kode yang membacanya, dia cek silang dan kasih tahu mana secret asli, mana yang dibaca-tapi-tak-dideklarasi, mana config mati, lalu bikinin .env.example bersih. Semua jalan di browser, .env kamu nggak pernah keluar tab.

https://ryanda9910.github.io/envxray/
bluesky: Two env bugs ship on repeat: a secret in a committed .env, and a process.env.X the code reads that nobody declared, so prod boots undefined. envxray cross-checks your .env against the code, flags both, and writes a clean .env.example. All in your browser.
